name: O.R.C. Ladybug
description: The O.R.C. Ladybug is the armored shock version of the Ladybug in Grounded 2. It is no longer a neutral rideable creature and instead acts as a heavy battering ram for O.R.C. patrols and waves.
behavior: It patrols short routes around MIX.R points and O.R.C. wave zones. It moves calmly until it finds a clear line to ram, then suddenly accelerates hard.
interactionWithPlayer: It rushes you as soon as it detects you and no longer has the passive window of a normal ladybug. Stay in front of it too long and the charge into side hit will pin you down fast.
interactionWithCreatures: It functions as the heavy unit of O.R.C. patrols and shoves aside smaller creatures that enter its route.
strategy: Fresh and busting damage are still its main weaknesses. Sidestep the charge, punish the recovery, and do not sit behind it for too long because the back buck hits hard.

combatStats.attackDamageSummary: Bite: 94. Running Charge: 150. Side Hit: 125. Back Buck: 150.

abilities.name: Bite
abilities.description: A direct heavy bite used once it is already on top of you.

abilities.name: Running Charge
abilities.description: It lines itself up and rushes straight ahead with its full body weight.

abilities.name: Side Hit
abilities.description: It swings its side to catch players circling around the charge.

abilities.name: Back Buck
abilities.description: It kicks hard backward to punish anyone staying behind it too long.
